source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10
distilled_thesis: The cup's release sends the reflected sign of bliss outward, so joy becomes something borne abroad rather than kept enclosed.
